---
title: "Tomás Urzúa"
subtitle: |
  Social Sciences Master's Student \
  [University of Chile](https://uchile.cl/) \
description-meta: "Tomás Urzúa is..."
image: "files/images/tomas.jpg"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
#sidebar: false
page-layout: full
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 80%
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-mail
      href: mailto:tomas.urzua@ug.uchile.cl
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/tomasurzuam
    - icon: orcid
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0009-0008-3167-6819
      target: _blank
---


::: {#hero-heading .justify}

Hello, I’m Tomás Urzúa. I am a sociologist from University of Chile and master student at the same institution.

My interests fall primarily into three areas of research: people’s redistributive preferences, the cultural effects of the privatization of services, and inequalities in education. I research these topics using a quantitative and open-science approach, employing tools such as R, Git/GitHub, and Visual Studio Code.

Currently I work as a research assistant at the [Market Justice and Deservingness of Social Welfare Project](https://jus-mer.com/), a project funded by the [National Agency for Research and Development (ANID)](https://www.anid.cl/) led by [Dr. Juan Carlos Castillo](https://jc-castillo.com/).

Previously, I worked as a research assistant for the [Social Cohesion Observatory (OCS-COES)](https://ocs-coes.com/) at the [Center of Studies of Social Conflict and Social Cohesion (COES)](https://coes.cl/). In addition, I have contributed to various research projects focused on teaching research tools, as well as to the writing of academic articles for publications such as [EDUMER (Moral Foundations of the Education Market and Their Implications for Civic Education in Chile)](https://jc-castillo.com/proyectos/posts/fondecyt-edumer/), [NUDOS (Millennium Center for Digital Inequalities and Opportunities)](https://www.nudos.cl/), and [LISA (Open Social Research Laboratory)](https://lisacoes.com/).



:::
